title: Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To
description: The three obligations nobody explains clearly: HAVE TO (external rule), MUST (internal/strong), DON'T HAVE TO (no need). And when to use each.
summary_pt_br: HAVE TO (obrigação externa, alguém impôs) x MUST (obrigação interna ou forte) x DON'T HAVE TO (não precisa) x MUSTN'T (proibido). Armadilha: 'don't have to' NÃO significa 'mustn't'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Have to, must, don't have to

scenes.text_en:
Joca listed his new job rules.
'I HAVE TO be online at 9 — they require it.
I MUST finish my sprint by Friday — a personal promise.
I DON'T HAVE TO wear a shirt with buttons — it's remote.
I MUSTN'T share company code — that's in the contract.'
scenes.text_pt:
Joca listou as regras do novo emprego.
'Tenho que estar online às 9 — a empresa exige.
Eu preciso terminar o sprint na sexta — promessa pessoal.
Não preciso usar camisa social — é remoto.
Não posso compartilhar código da empresa — contrato.'

scenes.title: Obligation toolkit
scenes.body_en: HAVE TO = external obligation (rule, law, boss). 'I have to wear a helmet.' MUST = internal or strong obligation (feels pressing). 'I must finish this.' DON'T HAVE TO = not necessary, optional. 'You don't have to come.' MUSTN'T = forbidden. 'You mustn't smoke here.' TRAP: 'don't have to' is NOT the same as 'mustn't'.
scenes.body_pt: HAVE TO = obrigação externa (regra, chefe). MUST = interna ou forte. DON'T HAVE TO = não precisa (opcional). MUSTN'T = proibido. ATENÇÃO: 'don't have to' NÃO é 'mustn't'. 'You don't have to come' = você não PRECISA vir. 'You mustn't come' = você NÃO PODE vir.

examples.en: You have to wear a mask in the hospital. (rule)
You don't have to wear a tie. (optional)
You mustn't run by the pool. (forbidden)
examples.pt: Não pode correr perto da piscina.

exercise.question: Your boss requires you at 9am. Which?
options: I have to be there at 9
I don't have to be there at 9
exercise.explanation: External rule → HAVE TO. 'Must' works too but slightly less natural for a rule imposed by someone else.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Regra externa = have to. Must também serve, mas have to é mais natural para regras dos outros.

exercise.question: The school uniform is OPTIONAL. Which tells students?
options: You don't have to wear the uniform
You have to wear the uniform
exercise.explanation: Optional = 'don't have to'. 'Mustn't wear' would mean forbidden.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Opcional = 'don't have to'. Cuidado para não usar 'mustn't' (proibido).

exercise.question: Complete: 'Smoking is forbidden here. You ___ smoke.'

turns.en: You don't have to answer right now.
But I must reply today. It's urgent.
turns.pt: Mas eu preciso responder hoje. É urgente.

exercise.explanation: Five levels of obligation. Pick the exact one you mean.

exercise.question: Complete: "What rules do you have to ___?"
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "What rules do you have to follow?"

exercise.question: Pick the best response. ('Tem que usar terno?')
options: Do you have to wear a suit?
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Do you have to wear a suit?"

scenes.title: Joca's new job rules
scenes.pt_summary: Must / have to / mustn't / don't have to.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: My new job has many rules.
turns.pt: Meu trabalho novo tem muitas regras.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What rules do you have to follow?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I must arrive at nine every day.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do you have to wear a suit?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No, I don't have to, but I must look professional.
turns.pt: Não preciso, mas tenho que parecer profissional.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do you have to work on weekends?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Sometimes I have to, but not often.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Right. I mustn't be late under any circumstance.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is a lot of responsibility.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It is, but I love the challenge.

scenes.title: Listening story — Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Joca and a student. The three obligations nobody explains clearly: HAVE TO (external rule), MUST (internal/strong), DON'T HAVE TO (no need). And when to use each. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: My new job has many rules.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: What rules do you have to follow?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I must arrive at nine every day.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Do you have to wear a suit?

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: No, I don't have to, but I must look professional.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Do you have to work on weekends?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Joca. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To". The three obligations nobody explains clearly: HAVE TO (external rule), MUST (internal/strong), DON'T HAVE TO (no need). And when to use each. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Joca's Obligations — Have To, Must, Don't Have To".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: Perfect English Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Regras de gramática + exercícios interativos gratuitos.
